dashboard.label: AWS CloudTrail SOC Monitoring Dashboard
dashboard.description: Dashboard for monitoring AWS CloudTrail security events in Splunk.

search.query: index=aws_cloudtrail (errorCode="AccessDenied" OR errorCode="UnauthorizedOperation") | stats count by userIdentity.arn eventName sourceIPAddress errorCode | sort - count
index=aws_cloudtrail eventName=ConsoleLogin responseElements.ConsoleLoginFailure="Failure" | table _time userIdentity.arn sourceIPAddress userAgent eventName

index=aws_cloudtrail eventSource=iam.amazonaws.com (eventName=CreatePolicy OR eventName=AttachUserPolicy OR eventName=PutUserPolicy OR eventName=CreateAccessKey OR eventName=UpdateAssumeRolePolicy) | table _time userIdentity.arn eventName sourceIPAddress requestParameters
index=aws_cloudtrail userIdentity.type="Root" | table _time userIdentity.type userIdentity.arn eventName sourceIPAddress userAgent
